meta.title: The adherence of pilate and non-pilate strains of neisseria gonorrhoeae to human and guinea-pig epithelial tissues

abstractHtml: Since gonococci adhered to all tissues examined, their ability to infect human endocervix and fallopian tube and their failure to infect human ectocervix or guinea-pig urogenital tract mucosae are determined by factors other than a capacity for primary adherence to the tissue.
